title: The Logic Mod
description: Never thought something in minecraft makes no sense?
body:
# **The Logic Mod**
Do you sometimes when play minecraft, think **"Well, that makes absolutely no sense"**? Me too.
This mod attemps to return a bit of logic back into Minecraft with a forever increasing number of features.

## Features
### - **Stonecutter blade hurts!**
Why didnt a giant sawblade even hurt you? Now it does

### - **Chainmail armor is now craftable**
  There is chain item in minecraft, why can't i just craft armor with chain?
  
<details>
<summary>Crafting</summary>

![chain helmet crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d432f1503f99f5780eca06b53dba008f75e4225_0.webp)
  ![chainmail chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4cf14f0b4252310ed8faae33ff27d53bb45e0f.png)
   ![chainmail leggins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d64fa8246611927a11d575edcd68f9b81d251bb.png)
   ![chainmail leggins crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af7d2c9789da3a268f6065eab66c741e071b15b7_0.webp)
  - I wanted to balance them as possible, so now they're a usefull option when on low iron cases

</details>



### - Realistic Fall Damage
Hay bale protects you from 80% of the fall damage if you fall onto it, now wool and other soft blocks too


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

- All types of wool have a **65%** FDR (Fall Damage Reduction)
- A full snow block has a **50%** FDR
- All leaves have a **15%** FDR
- Soul Sand has a **10%** FDR

Im working on a mod that uses real life equations to calculate damage, but its not ready now :(


</details>

### - Ore Blocks have a more realistic explosion resistance
You say i can explode 15 full cubic metres of iron with just a single TNT? Well now not so easy


<details>
<summary>Values</summary>

I made the reasearch and in the real world these are the results
![explosion realistic chart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d64e2020c2c16affef3166acedeba023cdd97da9.png)
### 83.3 TNTs to explode a single Diamond Block!?
That's too much, therefore here are the not-so-realistic **resistance** values i added
- **Diamond Block**: 15
- **Gold Block**: 14
- **Iron Block**: 12.9
- **Copper Block**: 10.9
- **Emerald Block**: 14.8
### 
To see all vanilla values click [HERE](https://mcreator.net/wiki/list-block-resistance-levels)

</details>

### - Changed item lava incineration
Why can I contain lava inside of a bucket but not a bucket inside of lava? Now that's changed


<details>
<summary>Item List</summary>

- Bucket
- Lava bucket
- All water bucket types (fishes)
- Iron Ingot
- Gold Ingot
- Diamond
- Anvil
- Minecart
- **Obsidian**
- More coming...
###
Want to delete stuff? Install [Trash Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) or y'know, throw it into a cactus or the void.

</details>

### - New Compostables
Why can't I compost bamboo if it's a plant? Why can't i compost potatoes? Now it follows a more logic approach


<details>
<summary>List of Compostables</summary>

- Rotten Flesh
- Poisonous Potato
- Apple
- Beetroot
- Beetroot Seeds
- Bread
- Carrot
- Cactus
- Dried Kelp
- Melon Slice
- Sweet Berries
- Sugar Cane
- Wheat
- Wheat Seeds
- Cake
- Cookie
- Pumpkin Pie
- Honeycomb
- Kelp
- Flowering Azalea
- Grass
- Tall Grass
- Dead Bush
- Fern
- Large Fern
- Azalea
- Oxeye Daisy
- Allium
- Blue Orchid
- Cornflower
- Dandelion
- Lilac
- Lily of the Valley
- Poppy
- Rose Bush
- Sunflower
- Wither Rose
- Torchflower
- Spore Blossom
- Chorus Flower
- Nether Wart
- Crimson Fungus
- Warped Fungus
- Weeping Vines
- Twisting Vines
- Shroomlight
- Brown Mushroom
- Red Mushroom
- Mushroom Stem
- Mycelium
- Bamboo
- Hanging Roots
- Moss Block
- Moss Carpet
- Flowering Azalea Leaves
- Vine
###
with a grand total of **57** new compostable items
</details>

### - Boats Step (1.20.1 only)
I remember transporting villagers and falling in that stupid path block, I couldn't get out! Now boats can climb up to half a block, making you able to sail easier on frozen biomes (and to transport villagers)

### - Armor negates Cactus Damage
Why do i prick myself with a cactus if i have full armor covering all my player? No more


### - Enderchest and beacons now Dragon inmune
And beacons too! The EnderDragon can't break obsidian so anything made out of obsidian shouldn't be broken.



### - Glass now breaks faster with pickaxes
Until now glass hadn't any type of prefered tool, so you couldnt break it faster than on bare hands


### Want to suggest new features? Check this out:

<details>
<summary>Basic Logic Mod principles</summary>

The mod has some small principles it follows when adding **new features**
- The mod should never add logic patchs that replace vanilla main used mechanics such as waterdrops
- Additions should add a new game mechanic or usefullness or make the game more inmersfull
- Additions shoudn't affect other mods in a meaningfull way
- Additions shouldn't make player experience significally worse in any way
### But most importantly,
- **NOTHING PHYSICS RELATED**, no falling trees, floating block falling mechanics etc.


</details>

# **Forge**/**NeoForge** version coming...
